reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros es muy rápida y buena, pero aveces se llena mucho les cuesta dar abasto. La atención del kiosco es buena y rápida, compré sólo golosinas desde que abrieron. No tomé un café ni comí algo de allí.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the beach bar is very fast and good, but sometimes it gets very busy and they struggle to keep up. The service at the kiosk is good and fast. I've only bought candy since they opened. I didn't get a coffee or eat anything there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNDVDLWZBEAE
